THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SCHERER SMITH & KENNY, LLP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SUNAK, PAUL $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $135.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,135.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
